excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that a pooled lookup map is a matched decoder-only transformer
a claim that this deterministic cue-copy diagnostic is positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A pooled-train query-token support-map diagnostic over the Stage 52-57 row family.
Evidence about whether the known support prior in Stage 57 can be recovered from training rows.
Fair reporting across the same RoPE/ALiBI/sinusoidal/no-position/PhaseWrap method set, with failed-run retention.

decision.claim_boundary: A pooled train lookup recovers the support-aware query cue and solves phase-cued retrieval for no-position too; this is not positional-method promotion.
